title: Epicness: More mobs
description: adds a bunch of mobs to your 1.12.2 world.
body:
Welcome
------------------
This mod adds several new creatures to your 1.12.2 world. These monsters pose a challenge for those who download it.

Creatures
------------------
There are too many creatures to list, so i'll name a few:

Wither Tallneck

Cockroaches

Shade

Ashing

Darkness

Brightness

Stretcher

Why would you want this mod?
-------------------
This mod introduces new dangers to your world that are great for a challenging experience. The mod also adds some new weapons which aid you in your fight against these strong foes. Overall, this mod is good for those who simply like creatures.

HEY! This mod will not receive any further updates!
